# LEZAC explosion playback oracle malformed fixture.
# Marks more than one breakpoint as frozen in a single instrumented run.
capture=explosion_playback
source=dosbox-regular-process-memory
temp_copy=1
visual_claim=0
instrumented_freeze_observed=1
runtime_freeze_patch_applied=1

runtime_cs=1A2B
runtime_ds=2B3C

break ghidra=1000:414A runtime=1A2B:414A label=explosion_dispatcher observed=process_memory_sampling_no_debugger_break
break ghidra=1000:370E runtime=1A2B:370E label=tile_damage_queue observed=process_memory_sampling_no_debugger_break
break ghidra=1000:4C96 runtime=1A2B:4C96 label=effect_forward_pass_call observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed
break ghidra=1000:4CA9 runtime=1A2B:4CA9 label=effect_reverse_pass_call observed=runtime_child_memory_freeze_observed
